hero.title: Partner With DreamDo
hero.subtitle: Together, we can equip a generation. Join our growing network of partners.

intro: DreamDo partners with schools, employers, NGOs, government institutions, and development partners who share our belief that Africa's young people deserve real opportunities to grow.

schools.name: Schools
schools.description: Bring DreamDo programs into your curriculum or after-school schedule. Give your students structured, experiential learning that complements classroom education.

employers.name: Employers & Businesses
employers.description: Host Pathways students for industry shadowing, offer mentors, or co-design internship opportunities. Build your talent pipeline while making a meaningful community impact.

ngos.name: NGOs & Civil Society
ngos.description: Align your youth development goals with DreamDo's proven programs. Co-implement projects, share resources, and expand reach together.

government.name: Government Institutions
government.description: Support national youth development priorities through scalable, evidence-based programming. We welcome policy dialogue and implementation partnerships.

development.name: Development Partners & Donors
development.description: Fund programs that deliver measurable outcomes. We provide transparent impact reporting and collaborate on program design aligned with your theory of change.

benefits.title: Why Partner With Us
items: Community engagement and visible social impact
CSR alignment with youth development and education goals
Access to talented young people for internships and recruitment
Co-branding and recognition as a champion of Africa's next generation

cta.title: Ready to Make an Impact?
cta.subtitle: Get in touch with our partnerships team to explore what we can build together.
